report.summary: Day 52 standup v9: Full 6-agent rotation since v8. Build-v6 created Cross-Chain Interoperability + DAO Governance guides (2 new learn pages). Both promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES → 398 slugs. Design-v6 polished both pages (ARIA, accordion FAQ, semantic nav, touch targets). Community-v7 drafted FOMC Day 1 social suite + sentiment recovery narrative (F&G 5→15→28). EOD-v6 confirmed 397→398 published, 2 pages now promoted. BTC $75,273 (+3.8% 24h). FOMC meeting UNDERWAY — decision TOMORROW 2pm ET. F&G 23-28 range (recovering from all-time low 5). ETF 5-day inflow streak ($767M weekly). Git locks now ~21h stale, 556 uncommitted files. 38 agent reports today.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v8 Standup
items: BTC PRICE: $75,273 (flat from v8). +3.8% 24h, +8.6% 7d. 24h vol $62.2B. Market cap $1.5T. Holding above $75K — notable strength heading into FOMC. Down 40% from ATH $126,073 (Oct 2025).

FEAR & GREED: 23-28 range depending on source (up from all-time low of 5 on Feb 6). 39-day extreme fear streak — longest since mid-2022. BTC at $75K vs F&G 23 remains historically bullish divergence. Every prior 30+ day extreme fear streak preceded rally (COVID +1,400%, Luna +158%, FTX +300%).

FOMC: Meeting Day 1 UNDERWAY (Mar 17). Rate decision TOMORROW 2pm ET, Powell presser 2:30pm ET. 92%+ hold probability at 3.50-3.75%. Key signal: DOT PLOT (not the rate). First meeting incorporating Iran conflict ($104-105 Brent) + Trump tariffs into projections. Powell's second-to-last meeting (exits May 23, Warsh incoming).

ETF FLOWS: 5-day consecutive inflow streak — FIRST of 2026. $767M weekly inflows. $700M+ in March total. BlackRock IBIT $115M single day (Mar 11). Fidelity FBTC +$15M. GBTC still bleeding -$16M/day. Total BTC ETF AUM $90.89B (6.43% of BTC market cap). BlackRock also launched ETHB (staked ETH ETF, Mar 12).
INSTITUTIONAL: Strategy Inc. bought 17K+ BTC at ~$71K avg, total 738,731 BTC. Coinbase Premium flipped positive. Institutions accumulating while retail stays fearful.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 398 (verified via grep, up from 396 at v8). Cross-Chain Interoperability + DAO Governance promoted this cycle. No pages currently in queue (both promoted).

CONTENT PIPELINE TODAY: 12 learn guides built across all cycles. 6 promoted to production. Queue now empty — needs refill from unqueued pages (DeFi Insurance, Airdrop Farming built but not on disk per design-v6 audit).
GIT: HEAD still at cb65a9d (Day 42). HEAD.lock ~21h stale. index.lock ~20h stale. 556 uncommitted files. All deploys blocked. Tax season content (27 days to April 15) cannot reach Google until fixed.

sections.title: Project Manager — Status Since v8
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED (6/6 agents): standup-v8 → build-v6 → publish → design-v6 → community-v7 → eod-v6. Every agent type ran since v8.

SHIPPED SINCE v8: Cross-Chain Interoperability Guide (~2,900 words, 14 min read — LayerZero, CCIP, Wormhole, Axelar deep dives, ERC-7683 intents). DAO Governance & Voting Guide (~2,700 words, 12 min read — governance flow, on-chain vs off-chain voting, delegate mechanics, top DAOs). Both promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (396→398). Both UX-polished (ARIA landmarks, accordion FAQ, semantic nav, 44px touch targets, dark theme fix). FOMC Day 1 social suite drafted (sentiment recovery, scenario breakdown, tax countdown, content drops). Sentiment shift SVG social card created. EOD-v6 QA audit passed.

BLOCKER P0 (9th consecutive standup): Git lock files — HEAD.lock ~21h, index.lock ~20h. 556 uncommitted files. ONLY Jefe can fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push. 2-minute fix blocking ALL deploys.
BLOCKER P0: Vercel trial status unknown/critical. If expired, all 398+ pages dark during FOMC meeting — highest organic search traffic moment of the week.
FLAG: DeFi Insurance + Airdrop Farming guides reportedly built by build-v5 but design-v6 found pages NOT on disk. Need rebuild or investigation next build cycle.

CARRY-OVER: 104 phantom published slugs (no page.tsx). 2 real TS errors (structured-data.examples.ts + crypto-index-funds). 0/6 public API routes have rate limiter wired. ~155 pages missing OG metadata.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 38 agent reports (including this v9). 12 learn guides built. 6 pages promoted. 12+ pages UX-polished. 7+ SVG social cards. 7+ social content suites. 6 QA audits.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION (CRITICAL, 9th consecutive standup): Remove git locks + resolve Vercel billing. 556 files trapped. FOMC Day 1 is NOW — decision drops TOMORROW 2pm ET. Our FOMC guide exists but can't be redeployed with fixes. BTC $75,273 + F&G recovering + ETF 5-day streak = maximum organic search interest. Command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit -m 'Day 52: batch commit' && git push. 2-minute fix. Every hour costs compounding SEO loss. 21+ hours blocked.

PRIORITY 2 — REBUILD DEFI INSURANCE + AIRDROP FARMING: Design-v6 confirmed these pages are NOT on disk despite build-v5 claiming creation. Queue is now empty (both Cross-Chain + DAO Governance promoted). Next build cycle must either rebuild these 2 pages or build 2 new guides to refill the pipeline. DeFi Insurance ($3.5B market, <0.5% DeFi TVL insured) and Airdrop Farming (Hyperliquid $2.6B, Jupiter $600M+) remain high-value targets.

PRIORITY 3 — FIRE FOMC + SENTIMENT RECOVERY SOCIAL CONTENT: Community-v7 has full content suite staged — FOMC Day 1 scenario breakdown, F&G recovery narrative (5→15→28), ETF streak thread ($767M, 5-day), Strategy 17K BTC buy, tax countdown (27 days), Powell exit narrative. Use LIVE page links (FOMC guide, DCA calculator, tax guide) since those pages are already in the Day 42 deploy. HOLD any links to Cross-Chain/DAO Governance until deploy confirms.

STRATEGIC NOTE: The sentiment recovery from F&G 5 (all-time low) to 23-28 while BTC holds $75K is the most significant macro signal since the Nov 2024 pre-$108K run. ETFs flowing in, institutions buying, retail still fearful = classic accumulation pattern. Tomorrow's dot plot will be the catalyst — our content machine has produced 38 reports and 12 learn guides today, but the deploy bottleneck means none of the last 10 days of content has reached Google. The content velocity is exceptional; the deployment pipeline is the single highest-leverage fix in the entire operation.
